findings.evidence: no evidence found: 0 of 5 indicator pattern(s) matched across 1 text unit(s); activated by trigger evidence 'customer accounts' in brief
findings.prerequisite_note: GDPR Arts. 25/35: a DPIA and data-protection-by-design measures must be completed BEFORE building a customer database or starting any large-scale processing of personal data - the canonical 'GDPR before the customer database' ordering. findings.seed_question: Has a DPIA been performed for the planned processing, and which design decisions did it change?

findings.prerequisite_note: GDPR Art. 6: a lawful basis (consent, contract, legitimate interests, ...) must be identified and documented BEFORE any personal data is collected - it cannot be retrofitted onto data already gathered. Verify against current regulation and jurisdiction.
